title: nicotiana rustica var. pavonii
intro: Nicotiana rustica var. pavonii, also known as mapacho or sacred tobacco, is a variety of the Nicotiana rustica plant that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. It contains alkaloids like nicotine and anabasine, which possess medicinal properties that can help alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. The health benefits of Nicotiana rustica var. pavonii include its ability to help manage chronic pain, improve sleep quality, and reduce anxiety and stress levels. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be dried and smoked or used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
